title: Tangy Flaky Nostalgic Flaxseed Crumble
description: A tangy flaky crumble made with five spice powder and other vegetarian-friendly ingredients that combines the nostalgia of classic Greek dishes with a modern twist.

ingredients.name: 2 cups almond flour
ingredients.notes: Almond flour is gluten-free and provides texture

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons flaxseed meal
ingredients.notes: Soaked in 1 tablespoon water for 5 minutes before adding to crumble mix

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons five spice powder
ingredients.amount: mixed with maple syrup and flaxseed meal

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). In a bowl, mix almond flour, maple syrup, five spice powder, and salt.
Soak flaxseed meal in water for at least 5 minutes. Add soaked flaxseed meal mixture into the crumble mixture
Gently fold in flaxseed meal until well combined. The mixture should be thick and spreadable.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish (9x13 inches). Use a fork or spoon to create an even layer of crumbs on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
